data.title: Westport’s Statement on Cybersecurity Incident
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 20, 2026, Westport Fuel Systems Inc. (referred to as "Westport" or "the Company") reported detecting unauthorized entry into its network on March 17, 2026. The breach included unauthorized access to specific internal IT business applications of Westport, as well as other business data and employee details. Westport is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol WPRT and on the Nasdaq under the symbol WPRT.

data.title: Best Platform to Find Primary Care Doctors (2026): MDVIP Named Leading Membership-Based Primary Care Network by Expert Consumers
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 20, 2026, Expert Consumers named MDVIP as a top concierge primary care network for the year. Emphasizing the company's focus on preventive care, the recognition underlines MDVIP's membership-based model. MDVIP stands out as the Best Platform to Find Primary Care Doctors, demonstrating its commitment to personalized and comprehensive healthcare services.

data.title: PermRock Royalty Trust Declares Monthly Cash Distribution
data.description: In Dallas on March 20, 2026, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE: PRT) announced a monthly cash distribution for holders of trust units (Trust Units) as of March 31, 2026. The distribution is payable on April 14, 2026.

data.title: ISS Recommends Full Support for SMEC Management Proposals, Opposes All SNT Shareholder Proposals
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, ISS is suggesting that shareholders of SMEC endorse all management proposals and oppose SNT's plan for board restructuring during the upcoming March 31 Annual General Meeting.

data.title: California Public Utilities Commission Conditionally Approves RNG Procurement Contract from Anaergia’s SoCal Biomethane Facility
data.description: An agreement for the supply of renewable natural gas (RNG) for Anaergia's SoCal Biomethane facility has been conditionally approved by the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC). This facility, located in Victorville, California and Burlington, Ontario, will be the first to provide RNG under the California SB 1440 program. Anaergia (TSX: ANRG; OTCQX: ANRGF) is set to play a significant role in this initiative.

data.title: Westwater Resources Reports Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
data.description: Centennial, Colorado - Westwater Resources, Inc. (NYSE American: WWR), a company specializing in energy technology and battery-grade natural graphite, unveiled its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The company highlighted its advancements in the Kellyton Graphite Plant, with ongoing investments made in 2025. The qualification line at Kellyton now has the capacity to produce over one metric ton daily of coated spherical graphite.

data.title: New Weaning Guide Helps Mothers Transition from Breastfeeding with Confidence
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Chicago, a growing number of mothers are facing the challenge of transitioning from breastfeeding to returning to work, managing family schedules, or exploring options for future family planning endeavors such as becoming a gestational surrogate. This underscores the increasing demand for empathetic, research-backed support when it comes to the weaning process.

data.title: Infosys and Formula E Launch AI-Powered Race Centre, Taking Fan Experience to Pole Position
data.description: A cutting-edge digital platform powered by Infosys Topaz is set to revolutionize innovation for race day and beyond in Bengaluru, India. The platform will provide real-time insights, marking a significant shift in the industry. Infosys, a top player in digital services, is leading this endeavor with notable shares in NSE (INFY), BSE (INFY), and NYSE (INFY). This development highlights the company's commitment to pushing boundaries and enhancing digital solutions.

data.title: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Announces Agreement to Acquire Breathe Right®, the Leader in Nasal Strips
data.description: TARRYTOWN, N.Y., March 20, 2026 - Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. revealed their acquisition deal to buy the Breathe Right® brand and other brands from Foundation Consumer Healthcare for a whopping $1.045 billion. The net value after considering expected tax benefits worth $150 million amounts to approximately $900 million. This move marks a significant development for Prestige as they expand their portfolio and market presence through this multi-billion dollar agreement.

data.title: Skyrover Debuts at Best Buy, Delivering Premium Drones with Strong Value for U.S. Creators
data.description: Today in Dover, Delaware, on March 20, 2026, Skyrover, a cutting-edge consumer drone company targeting the U.S. market, revealed its official debut through Best Buy, a renowned electronics retailer in the United States. This announcement closely aligns with Best Buy's Spring Sale kickoff.
